positive: A stylized, minimalist celestial map depicting constellations, planets, and mythical zodiac animals floating within a deep indigo cosmic void. The foreground elements, such as crescent moons, stylized constellations (Ursa Major, Orion), and planetary orbits, should be rendered in glowing lines of gold leaf and ethereal turquoise, creating a luminous, elegant tapestry. Incorporate a central, visually arresting stylized depiction of the Milky Way arching across the scene. The composition must be perfectly balanced for apparel printing, with clean, distinct silhouettes against a deep, atmospheric background. The style should blend Art Nouveau elegance with modern geometric precision, ensuring high contrast and excellent visual impact. Studio lighting, highly detailed, vector illustration quality.
